rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §39.0263 governs administration of benchmark assessment instruments in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operational interaction.
quote: Sec. 39.0263. ADMINISTRATION OF DISTRICT-REQUIRED OR CAMPUS-REQUIRED BENCHMARK ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
